summary: P1 Features Test Complete - Backend: 17/17 passed (100%), Frontend: All P1 features verified. Add-ons catalog shows 5 products with purchase buttons. Kinship invite shortcuts working with toggle and panel. One bug fixed: session.id -> session.session_id in addon checkout.
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created - used existing test data
context_for_next_testing_agent: P1 features fully tested and working. Add-on checkout had a bug (session.id should be session.session_id) which was fixed. Kinship invite shortcuts require kinship relationships to be present and only show for host/organizer roles.

addon_checkout_session_id.issue: Used session.id instead of session.session_id for CheckoutSessionResponse

addons_catalog: Products have id, name, description, price_cents, price_display, billing, category fields
Product IDs: storage-10gb, storage-25gb, templates-premium, sms-100, sms-500
addons_checkout: All 5 addon types generate valid checkout URLs
kinship_groups: Returns groups dict and members list
Groups include relationship type as key with list of relationships
frontend_subscription_page: Cards show name, description, price, and category badge
frontend_courtyards_page: Kinship invite toggle visible with data-testid='kinship-invite-toggle'
Toggle expands kinship invite panel with data-testid='kinship-invite-panel'
Groups displayed: Parents, Siblings with member counts
Quick invite buttons for registered members
regression: Activity Feed page loads with 18 activities
Kinship Map page loads with graph visualization
Legacy Threads page loads with 10 threads
Memory Vault page loads with Voice Recorder button
RevenueCat status endpoint returns configured status
